spec.goal: Redesign the ZecurX landing page from dark navy to a light/airy premium SaaS design inspired by daylit.com, using a white + light blue + navy color theme while preserving all text content, routes, and component file structure.
requirements: Replace all CSS variables in globals.css with light theme values (white bg, navy primary, light blue accent, slate muted)
Update Hero section: white bg, subtle blue radial glow, reduced particles (~40, blue), font-bold headline, newsreader italic muted line, navy gradient ShimmerButton, trust text below CTAs
Update LogoCarousel: remove dark radial gradient, clean white/f8fafc bg, keep grayscale logos, add subtle border lines
Update Stats: light #f8fafc bg, navy stat numbers, blue suffixes, more vertical padding
Update Services: replace MagicCard+BorderBeam with clean white cards (1px #e2e8f0 border, rounded-2xl), pill section badge, hover lift+shadow, tag pills instead of checkmark bullets
Update Solutions: light theme colors for scroll-driven sticky panel — navy active border, #e2e8f0 inactive, slate text colors, light ImagePlaceholder
Update Industries: replace MagicCard+BorderBeam with clean white cards, colored top accent border, #f8fafc alternating bg, pill badge
Update Testimonials: replace MagicCard with clean white cards, #e2e8f0 borders, newsreader italic quotes, light blue quote marks
Redesign WhyUs: replace image-based bento grid with 6-card grid (3 existing reasons + 3 new), clean white cards with icons, no CDN images
Update CTA section: navy gradient background, white text, white buttons, keep AnimatedGridPattern+Ripple with adjusted colors
Update Navbar: white/glass bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl, slate-200 border, navy text, remove forceDark conditionals, clean dropdown styling
Update Footer: bg-slate-50, #e2e8f0 border, navy headings, slate links
Update globals.css utility classes: change bg-grid-white and floating-element colors for light theme
All animations must be entrance-only (no continuous except marquee), using BlurFade inView and Framer Motion
constraints: Keep ALL text content exactly the same — titles, descriptions, CTAs, links, stats, testimonials
Keep ALL navigation links and routes unchanged
Keep component file structure (same file paths)
Light mode design only — no dark mode
Use existing Tailwind CSS variables from globals.css where possible
Use process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_CDN_URL for existing image paths
No generic AI look — should feel like $2000+ agency-designed site
outOfScope: Adding new npm packages or dependencies
spec.doneWhen: The site builds without errors (next build), all 13 files are updated with light theme, the landing page renders with white/light blue/navy design matching daylit.com patterns, all sections have proper scroll-triggered animations, mobile responsive, and all navigation/links remain functional.

tasks.title: Update globals.css theme variables
tasks.description:
Update /home/wnxd/zecurx-web/src/app/globals.css to replace the dark navy OKLCH theme with light theme values.

In the :root block (line 234-279), replace ALL CSS variable values:
- --background: #ffffff (oklch(1 0 0))
- --foreground: #0f172a (oklch(0.15 0.03 260))
- --card: #ffffff
- --card-foreground: #0f172a
- --popover: #ffffff
- --popover-foreground: #0f172a
- --primary: #1e3a5f (oklch(0.30 0.06 250))
- --primary-foreground: #ffffff
- --secondary: #f8fafc (oklch(0.98 0.003 250))
- --secondary-foreground: #0f172a
- --muted: #f1f5f9 (oklch(0.96 0.005 250))
- --muted-foreground: #64748b (oklch(0.55 0.03 255))
- --accent: #3b82f6 (oklch(0.62 0.21 260))
- --accent-foreground: #ffffff
- --destructive: keep as-is
- --border: #e2e8f0 (oklch(0.92 0.01 250))
- --input: #e2e8f0
- --ring: #3b82f6
- --sidebar values: match the light theme equivalents

Also update:
1. The bg-grid-white utility (line 304-309) to use rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) instead of rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)
2. The .floating-element background (line 420) to use a light-appropriate color like oklch(0.80 0 0)
3. Remove or update the .dark .floating-element rule (line 425-427)

Keep ALL @keyframes, @theme inline definitions (just update color vars), and all other utility classes. Keep scroll-behavior, font-family, scroll-margin-top, and no-scrollbar styles.
tasks.verify: Run `npx next build` — no CSS compilation errors. Open site and verify white background, navy text, light borders throughout.
tasks.output:
Done. Here's the summary:

## Task Complete: Update globals.css theme variables

**File changed:** `src/app/globals.css`

**Changes made:**

1. **:root CSS variables (lines 234-279)** — Replaced all dark navy OKLCH values with light theme:
   - `--background`: deep navy → white (`oklch(1 0 0)`)
   - `--foreground`: light text → navy (`oklch(0.15 0.03 260)`)
   - `--card`/`--popover`: dark card → white
   - `--primary`: sky blue → deep navy (`oklch(0.30 0.06 250)`)
   - `--secondary`: muted navy → blue-tinted white (`oklch(0.98 0.003 250)`)
   - `--muted`: dark muted → light slate (`oklch(0.96 0.005 250)`)
   - `--accent`: dark accent → vibrant blue (`oklch(0.62 0.21 260)`)
   - `--border`/`--input`: dark borders → light slate (`oklch(0.92 0.01 250)`)
   - `--ring`: sky blue → vibrant blue
   - All `--sidebar-*` variables: matched to light equivalents

2. **bg-grid-white utility (line 304-309)** — Changed grid lines from `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05)` to `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)` for visibility on white background

3. **`.floating-element` (line 420)** — Updated background from `oklch(0.45 0 0)` to `oklch(0.80 0 0)` for light-appropriate appearance

4. **`.dark .floating-element` (lines 425-427)** — Removed entirely (no longer needed)

**Verification:** `npx next build` completed successfully — no CSS compilation errors. All 125 pages generated.

**Commit:** `739c9ec` on master

**Notes for subsequent tasks:** Components using hardcoded dark colors (e.g., inline `bg-[#0a0f1a]`, `text-white`, dark gradients) will still appear dark until those component files are updated separately.

Verification: All checks pass:

1. **`:root` variables (lines 234-280)** — All updated to light theme: white background (`oklch(1 0 0)`), navy foreground (`oklch(0.15 0.03 260)`), light borders (`oklch(0.92 0.01 250)`), vibrant blue accent (`oklch(0.62 0.21 260)`), blue-tinted whites for secondary/muted/sidebar.

2. **`bg-grid-white` (lines 305-309)** — Grid lines changed to `rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)` for light backgrounds.

3. **`.floating-element` (line 421)** — Background updated to `oklch(0.80 0 0)` (light gray).

4. **`.dark .floating-element`** — Removed (only one `.floating-element` block exists).

5. **Build** — `npx next build` completed successfully with no CSS compilation errors. All pages generated.

RESULT: PASS
DETAILS: All CSS variable changes verified — `:root` uses light theme values (white bg, navy text, light borders, blue accents), grid utility uses dark lines for light bg, floating-element lightened, dark variant removed. Build succeeds with no errors.

tasks.title: Redesign Hero section light theme
tasks.description:
Update /home/wnxd/zecurx-web/src/components/hero.tsx to implement the daylit.com-style light hero. Changes: 1. Background: Keep bg-background (now white via CSS vars). Update the radial glow div's gradient to use rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.06) center fading to transparent. 2. Particles: Change color from '#38bdf8' to '#3b82f6', reduce quantity from 70 to 40, keep size 0.4. 3. Pill badge: Update from 'border-border bg-card' to 'border-blue-200 bg-blue-50/80'. Keep the green ping dot and AnimatedShinyText. Update AnimatedShinyText text color class to 'text-slate-600'. 4. Headline (h1): Change from 'font-semibold' to 'font-bold'. Keep size classes (text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl lg:text-8xl). The second line 'before attackers do.' should be wrapped in a span with 'font-newsreader italic text-slate-400' (more muted than current muted-foreground). 5. Subtitle: Keep as-is — text-muted-foreground will now resolve to slate gray via CSS vars. 6. ShimmerButton: Change background prop to 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a5f, #3b82f6)', shimmerColor to '#93c5fd'. Keep borderRadius='100px'. 7. Secondary button: Change 'border-border' to 'border-slate-300', 'hover:border-foreground/30' to 'hover:border-slate-400', 'hover:bg-card' to 'hover:bg-slate-50'. 8. After the CTA buttons div, add a small trust line:

Trusted by 50+ companies across India

Keep ALL text content, links, BlurFade animations, WordRotate, and component structure exactly the same.
tasks.verify: Site renders Hero with white bg, subtle blue glow, navy headline with italic muted second line, gradient CTA button, trust text below CTAs.

tasks.title: Update LogoCarousel light theme
tasks.description:
Update /home/wnxd/zecurx-web/src/components/ui/logo-carousel-demo.tsx for light theme.

Changes:
1. Section: Keep 'bg-background' (now white). Add 'border-y border-slate-100' for subtle top/bottom separation.
2. Remove the dark radial gradient blob div entirely (lines 33-38, the div with bg-[radial-gradient(...)]) — not needed in light theme.
3. The 'Trusted by teams at' text: keep 'text-muted-foreground' class (will now be slate gray).

Also update /home/wnxd/zecurx-web/src/components/ui/logo-cloud-4.tsx:
1. In the logo img className, change the filter for non-darkSrc logos: replace 'brightness-0 invert opacity-60' with 'grayscale opacity-50 hover:grayscale-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-300' for a grayscale-to-color hover effect on light bg.
2. The gradient fade overlays on left/right edges use 'from-background to-transparent' — this will automatically work since --background is now white.

Keep all logo data, CDN_URL usage, InfiniteSlider component, and structure.
tasks.verify: Logo section has white bg with subtle borders, logos display in grayscale with color on hover, edge fades are white-to-transparent.

tasks.title: Redesign WhyUs section card grid
tasks.description:
Completely redesign /home/wnxd/zecurx-web/src/components/why-us.tsx from image-based bento to a 6-card icon grid. Replace the entire component implementation while keeping the same export name and 'use client' directive. New implementation: 1. Remove Image import (no longer needed). Add imports: { Shield, Brain, CheckCircle, Zap, Clock, Wrench } from 'lucide-react' and { BlurFade } from '@/components/ui/blur-fade'. 2. Define REASONS array with 6 items (keep existing 3, add 3 new): - { icon: Shield, title: 'DevSec-first approach', body: 'We embed security directly into your sprint cycles — not as an afterthought. Ship faster without sacrificing security posture.' } - { icon: Brain, title: 'AI-native threat intelligence', body: 'Our threat engine learns from every engagement to identify novel attack vectors before your adversaries can weaponize them.' } - { icon: CheckCircle, title: 'Zero-friction compliance', body: 'SOC 2, ISO 27001, DPDP Act — we turn months-long compliance projects into structured 90-day programs with full evidence support.' } - { icon: Zap, title: 'Startup-first pricing', body: 'Transparent, fixed-scope pricing designed for seed-to-Series B companies. No enterprise bloat.' } - { icon: Clock, title: '72-hour turnaround', body: 'Most assessments delivered within 72 hours. Critical findings reported in real-time as we go.' } - { icon: Wrench, title: 'Remediation support', body: "We don't just find vulnerabilities — we help your engineering team fix them with code-level guidance." } 3. Section: id='why-us', className='py-28 md:py-36 bg-background' 4. Header: Centered, with pill badge WHY ZECURX. Keep same h2 text: 'Built for teams that can't afford to get hacked'. Keep the subtitle p tag. 5. Card grid: 'grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6'. Each card: - BlurFade wrapper with inView stagger delay -
- Icon:
- Title:

{title}

- Body:

{body}

6. Use BlurFade for section header and stagger for cards. 7. Remove all Image components, CDN URLs, gradient overlays, bento layout, and compliance badge pills. Keep the same component export: export function WhyUs()
tasks.verify: WhyUs shows 6 clean cards in 3-column grid with icons, no images, proper hover effects, responsive layout.

tasks.title: Redesign CTA section dark gradient
tasks.description:
Update /home/wnxd/zecurx-web/src/components/landing/CTASection.tsx for navy gradient CTA section.

Changes:
1. Section: Change 'bg-card' to a navy gradient. Add inline style: style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1e3a5f, #0f172a)' }}. Keep 'relative py-24 md:py-32 overflow-hidden'.
2. AnimatedGridPattern: Change 'fill-primary/20 stroke-primary/20' to 'fill-white/10 stroke-white/10'. Keep the mask-image radial gradient.
3. Radial glow div: Change oklch color to 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15)' for a brighter blue glow on dark bg.
4. Ripple: Keep as-is, it will render subtle on dark bg.
5. Headline: Change 'text-foreground' to 'text-white'. Keep 'font-manrope font-semibold'. Upgrade to 'font-bold text-4xl md:text-5xl'.
6. Subtitle p: Change 'text-muted-foreground' to 'text-white/80'.
7. Replace ShimmerButton with two clean buttons:
   - Primary: <Link href='/contact'><motion.button whileHover={{ scale: 1.03 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }} className='bg-white text-[#1e3a5f] rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-base font-semibold font-inter transition-shadow duration-300 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-white/20 cursor-pointer'>Get Your Free Assessment</motion.button></Link>
   - Secondary (add new): <Link href='/how-we-work'><motion.button whileHover={{ scale: 1.03 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }} className='border border-white/30 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-base font-semibold font-inter transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/10 cursor-pointer'>See How We Work</motion.button></Link>
   - Wrap both in a flex row with gap-4, centered.
8. Bottom text: Change 'text-muted-foreground' to 'text-white/60'.
9. Add motion import if not already present.

Keep ALL text content, BlurFade stagger, AnimatedGridPattern, Ripple components.
tasks.verify: CTA section has navy-to-dark gradient bg, white text, white primary button, white outline secondary button, grid pattern overlay visible.

tasks.title: Update Navbar light theme styling
tasks.description:
Update /home/wnxd/zecurx-web/src/components/landing/CreativeNavBar.tsx for light glassmorphism theme.

Changes:
1. Header element (line 83-88): Replace 'bg-card border border-border shadow-lg' with 'bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-slate-200/60 shadow-lg shadow-black/[0.03]'.
2. Logo text span (line 107): Remove the forceDark ternary, always use 'text-foreground' (now navy).
3. Desktop nav links: Replace all forceDark ternaries with just the light versions:
   - Active: 'text-foreground'
   - Default: 'text-slate-500 hover:text-foreground'
4. Academy link: Same treatment — remove forceDark ternary.
5. CTA Button (line 193-207): Change 'bg-foreground text-background' to 'bg-[#1e3a5f] text-white'. Change hover shadow to 'hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-[#1e3a5f]/20'.
6. Dropdown border-t (line 236): Change 'border-white/[0.06]' to 'border-slate-100'.
7. Dropdown item hover (line 262): Change 'hover:bg-white/[0.04]' to 'hover:bg-slate-50'.
8. Dropdown bottom border (line 275): Change 'border-white/[0.06]' to 'border-slate-100'.
9. Mobile menu panel (line 309): Change 'bg-background' to 'bg-white'. Change 'border-border/50' to 'border-slate-200'.
10. Mobile menu header border (line 311): 'border-slate-200'.
11. Mobile bottom section (line 393): Change 'bg-muted/30' to 'bg-slate-50'.
12. Mobile toggle button (line 215): Keep 'text-foreground hover:bg-foreground/10'.

Keep ALL nav data, links, animations, CartIcon integration, mobileMenuOpen logic, dropdown hover/timeout logic. The forceDark prop can remain in the interface but its conditionals should be simplified to always use light theme values (or remove it entirely — the layout forces light theme).
